ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the cryptocurrency was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency for the day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of transactions for the cryptocurrency */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_volume_currency" REAL /* Trading volume in the cryptocurrency's native currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related market data entry */,
  "ppo_result" TEXT /* Result of the Percentage Price Oscillator calculation */,
  "short_ema" REAL /* Short exponential moving average (EMA) value */,
  "long_ema" REAL /* Long EMA value */,
  "ppo_signal" TEXT /* PPO signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active/inactive) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., mean reversion, momentum) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest recorded price for the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest recorded price for the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Open interest in the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price movement, system update) */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be triggered (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)
